summary: Tested P1 features for The Doggy Company. All 17 backend tests passed. Fixed critical bug in /api/quotes/member endpoint (route ordering issue). Frontend verified: Pawmeter badges display on product cards, cross-pillar filters work, Quote Builder in Service Desk works.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed route ordering bug in quote_builder_routes.py - /member endpoint was being matched by /{quote_id} route
Pawmeter scores added to all products (1026 products updated with pawmeter.overall = 3.0)
PawmeterBadge and PawmeterStars components properly display on ProductCard in both grid and list views
Cross-pillar filters (PILLAR_FILTERS) correctly implemented with 10 pillars
QuotesTab properly lazy-loaded in MemberDashboard with user and token props
seed_data_creation: Added pawmeter scores to 1026 products (overall: 3.0, all criteria: 3.0)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully functional. Member quotes API fixed. Pawmeter displays on shop page. Quote Builder works in Service Desk.

pawmeter_display_on_product_cards.details: PawmeterBadge shows 🐾 3.0 on product cards in grid view. PawmeterStars shows in list view.

pawmeter_rated_filter.details: Quick filter '🐾 Pawmeter Rated' filters products with pawmeter.overall >= 3.0

member_quotes_api.details: Returns quotes for member email with party_details and access_token. Fixed route ordering bug.

quotes_tab_in_dashboard.details: QuotesTab component integrated in MemberDashboard at line 882-884 (desktop) and lazy-loaded at line 989-993

cross_pillar_filters.details: 10 pillar filters (All, Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care, Enjoy, Fit, Learn, Shop) work on shop page

quote_builder_in_service_desk.details: Create Quote button visible on Celebrate tickets. Quote Builder modal shows party details, items, discount, and send functionality.

screenshots_taken: shop_page_products.png - Shop page with Pawmeter badges on product cards
shop_celebrate_filter.png - Celebrate pillar filter applied (294 products)
party_ticket_detail.png - Party Planning Request ticket with Create Quote button
quote_builder_modal.png - Quote Builder modal with items, discount, and send button

bug_fixed.root_cause: Route /{quote_id} was defined before /member, so 'member' was being matched as a quote_id
